{{CargoRelic
|name=Isabella
|class_id=22135
|rank=AAA
|affct=ART
|birthday=04-04
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On Apr 4, 1499 AD, Leonardo da Vinci drew this sketch of Isabella d'Este while staying in the city of Mantua.<br>Portrait of Isabella d'Este, a pencil drawing by Leonardo da Vinci. Da Vinci used different shades of black, red, and brown to sketch the outlines and a rubbing brush to create shading on the face and hair. This sketch by Leonardo da Vinci exemplifies both his earlier artistic style and the aesthetic of his later works.
|fame=35
|art=73
|fth=42
|civ=49
|tech=44
|ss1=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +9<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90
|ss2=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +12<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +12<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90
|ss3=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +15<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +15<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90
|ss4=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +21<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +21<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90
|ss5=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +27<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +27<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90
|ss7=Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail ATK +27<br>Per 5 Tadpole Pond LVLs, Snail RUSH +27<br>Tadpole Pond LVL: 90/90<br>Snail RUSH +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: B-tad Output +15%
|skill2=[[File:Tadpolepond skill II.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: Generate W-tads by +15%
}}
